name: standards-refresh discloses author sharing when it processes a publicly resolvable source and stays silent for local file sources
command:
OUT=/tmp/cl564-r68-$$; mkdir -p $OUT/out; cat > $OUT/localreg.yaml <

Local rule

Services must log health.

' > $OUT/s.html; cd $OUT && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/standards-refresh.sh" --registry $OUT/localreg.yaml --force --now 2026-07-11T00:00:00Z --out-dir $OUT/out 2>$OUT/local.err; ! grep -q 'shared PUBLIC source' $OUT/local.err && echo file-source-stays-silent 1>&2; rm -rf $OUT
